Description
ActiverseUtils
 

  • Uses of ActorVector in ActiverseUtils

    Methods in ActiverseUtils that return ActorVector
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ActorVector
    ActorVector.add(ActorVector other)
    Adds another vector to this one.
    ActorVector
    ActorVector.normalize()
    Returns a new vector representing the direction (unit vector) of this vector.
    ActorVector
    ActorVector.scale(double scalar)
    Scales the vector by a scalar multiplier.
    ActorVector
    ActorVector.subtract(ActorVector other)
    Subtracts another vector from this one.
    ActorVector
    ActorVector.toAcceleration(double mass)
    Simulates a force applied on a mass and returns the resulting acceleration vector.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ActorVector
    ActorVector.add(ActorVector other)
    Adds another vector to this one.
    double
    ActorVector.angleBetween(ActorVector other)
    Calculates the angle in degrees between this vector and another.
    double
    ActorVector.dot(ActorVector other)
    Computes the dot product between this vector and another.
